label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 9

extraction.one_line_summary: CARUSO Damiano soloed from breakaway on Alto Collado Venta Luisa, winning by 1:05 as ROGLIC extended red jersey lead over imploding BERNAL
tactical_patterns: YATES Adam initiated GC attacks on Velafique but was counterproductive, dragging ROGLIC/MASS to close own moves down.
BOUCHARD Geoffrey bridged from favorites group to breakaway on descent before Velafique, exploiting transitional terrain gap.
ROGLIC Primoz abandoned teammates to chase solo when YATES attacked, prioritizing bonus seconds over team protection.
Ineos Grenadiers set pace on Alto Collado specifically to shake GC riders, revealing defensive strategy despite no stage ambition.

rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: positive: Destroyed breakaway solo on Alto Collado Venta Luisa, showing climbing strength unprecedented for domestique role
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: Lost 2:10 including bonus seconds on Velafique, concerning implosion for young rider jersey wearer
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: Initiated attacks that only served ROGLIC/MASS, tactical naivety in selecting when to move
rider_signals.MASS Henikk: positive: Only rider matching ROGLIC on final climbs, emerging as primary GC threat at 28 seconds
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: Required nursing from POWLESS/PARDOE throughout stage, serious form concerns for Bora leader
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: Chain throw on descent before Velafique ended polka dot bid, but fragility shown before mechanical
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: Part of elite quartet reaching YATES group, UAE showing depth beyond typical support role
